title: Combat Regeneration
description: Gives `Regeneration I` and removes `Mining Fatigue` from the mob that kills the entity's attack target.

apply_to_family.title: Apply To Family
apply_to_family.description: Determines if the mob will grant mobs of the same type combat buffs if they kill the target.

apply_to_self.title: Apply To Self
apply_to_self.description: Determines if the mob will grant itself the combat buffs if it kills the target.

regeneration_duration.title: Regeneration Duration
regeneration_duration.description: The duration in seconds of Regeneration I added to the mob. Can also be set to "infinite"
